base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of castle_regions — a tile from 1997 castlevania symphony of night. Normal Castle regions — Entrance/Marble Gallery/Outer Wall/Long Library/Abandoned Mine/Clock Tower/Chapel/Underground Caverns/Olrox's Quarters + Inverted Castle mirror versions (late-game reveal). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Normal Castle regions — Entrance/Marble Gallery/Outer Wall/Long Library/Abandoned Mine/Clock Tower/Chapel/Underground Caverns/Olrox's Quarters + Inverted Castle mirror versions (late-game reveal)
